data.biography: Mark Jiruntanin Trairattanayon is a Thai actor under GMMTV. He graduated from Sarasas Witaed Saimai School, and later got his degree in industrial engineering at Sirindhorn International Institute of Technology, an institute within Thammasat University.
data.name: Jiruntanin Trairattanayon
จิรันธนิน ตรัยรัตนยนต์

data.biography: 小名 Mark，全名為 Jiruntanin Trairattanayon（吉朗塔寧·歹拉塔納永），GMMTV旗下男演員，畢業於泰國國立法政大學。
